name: FlexGuard

data_sources.note: Prudential FlexGuard indexed variable annuity (RILA). Multiple index crediting strategies: cap rate (three variants) and uncapped accelerated growth (two variants). Issued by Pruco Life Insurance Company / Prudential Annuities Life Assurance Corp.
Prudential launched FlexGuard 2.0 in Q4 2025 with new investment allocation options. Original FlexGuard (this product) remains in-force; spec covers the original FlexGuard base contract.
Prudential FlexGuard rate center (current rates and caps). Cap, buffer, and term structure confirmed; current cap rates within publicly posted range used in synthetic anchor.
Pruco Life Insurance Company / Prudential Annuities Life Assurance Corp. AM Best FSR A+ (Superior). Synthetic anchor 'A+' confirmed.

verification_notes: AM Best A+ confirmed; product structure (cap rate + uncapped strategies, 1/3/6-yr terms, 10/15/20 buffer) verified against carrier product page; surrender schedule and exact current cap rates within posted public ranges — not modified from synthetic.
